title: Cobblemon and Gears
description: a cobblemon/create modpack with over 500 hours of test/play time
body:
![cobblemon and gears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d019df11e3842f6f0c7f5211cc7093cad0b6d9c9.png) ![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5112cabeb38f917b088922ff6a74ad19693c1b1c.png) - you can find and catch **cobblemons** all over the world they are pokemons but pixelated - you can **create** all kinds of big contraptions like farms or big doors - when you die you become a **corpse** that can't be destroyed so you will never lose youre stuff even youre friends can't acces it for the first 30 minutes - you can **travel** on boats, airplanes, airships and even on youre own cobblemons - **server side suported** if you remove the following mods on server side: 1. Enhanced Attack Indicator 2. Dynamic Crosshair 3. smoothswapping 4. Cubes Without Borders (CWB) - if you havent done it jet you wil need to increase youre **designated ram** to play this modpack [**![alt-text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/COBBLEMON_AND_GEARS/MP_COBBLEGEARS_Promo.webp)**](https://bisecthosting.com/superbender) ![screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc2fd35c3383d4cd8947df0a96693b676b6a0d8.png) ![cobblemon screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3af2954ec8be9715e5c8225f9b35d1a1512b58a.png) ![create screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3e28f117a3e3c0640bdc9833c56700ae468b0e.png) ![fire tampel screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a0517b16bb258a62e2169bd932f51dea55b77b.png) ![night ships screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc5d2c3b035471cd50e6fe64f1f6f16c2d2915d_0.webp) ![mod list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97820e875bd7065c5a83792f1abc38a49c54c92b.png)
